august.title: August Smart Lock
august.blurb: Consumer-friendly, retrofits most deadbolts, integrates with Hostfully + OwnerRez.

schlage.title: Schlage Encode Plus
schlage.blurb: Commercial-grade keypad lock, Apple home key support.

remotelock.title: RemoteLock
remotelock.blurb: Multi-platform lock management; works with most PMS systems.

minut.title: Minut
minut.blurb: Privacy-respecting noise + occupancy monitor; Airbnb/VRBO compatible.

noiseaware.title: NoiseAware
noiseaware.blurb: Indoor + outdoor noise sensors; party-prevention focused.

hostfully.title: Hostfully
hostfully.blurb: PMS + digital guidebooks; built for STR portfolios.

turno.title: Turno (TurnoverBnB)
turno.blurb: Cleaner marketplace + scheduling; pairs well with the dispatch generator.
